exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your social entrepreneurship forward
items: Identify and research 3 specific social problems in your local community that align with your skills and interests
Complete a personal skills and resources audit to map your strengths, network, and available time for social impact work
Interview 5 people currently working in social entrepreneurship or nonprofit leadership to understand their daily challenges and lessons learned
Research and document the regulatory requirements and legal structures for social ventures in your state or country
Create a detailed theory of change document outlining how your proposed solution will address the root causes of your chosen social problem
Attend 3 local community meetings, town halls, or nonprofit events to observe firsthand the social issues and stakeholder dynamics in your area
